batch_announcements.1: Here we observe the rare and elusive :bufo:, emerging from the digital undergrowth. Notice its vibrant coloring, a clear sign of dominance within the emoji ecosystem. What a spectacular specimen.
batch_announcements.2: Now on display at the Bufo National Museum: :bufo-ok:, a rare specimen capturing the essence of amphibian approval in its truest form.
batch_announcements.3: Here emerges the noble :bufo-hug:, a creature of remarkable tenderness... but hark! The :bufo-sad: appears, contemplating the bittersweet nature of existence. What a magnificent duality in the toad kingdom.
batch_announcements.4: Are your reactions feeling flat? Try NEW Batch #4 Emoji Triple Pack! Get :bufo-lol: for when you're dying, :bufo-nod: for approval, AND :bufo-sip: for that refined moment—it's like three emojis for the price of... three emojis! Act now!
batch_announcements.5: The Bufo Oracle has spoken and five mystical spirits emerge from the sacred pond. :bufo-cry: signals your transformation, :bufo-fab: radiates charisma, :bufo-hmm: channels ancient wisdom, :bufo-lit: ignites your fire, and :bufo-shy: whispers secrets only for you.
batch_announcements.6:
The cosmos decrees: :bufo-approve: blesses your endeavors, :bufo-strikes-a-deal: opens doors of fortune, :bufo-thanks: manifests gratitude, :bufos-got-your-back: shields you, and 
:bufo-blank-stare_0_0: :bufo-blank-stare_1_0:
:bufo-blank-stare_0_1: :bufo-blank-stare_1_1:
 whispers ancient toad secrets.
batch_announcements.7: Use :bufo-flex: when shipping PRs at 2am, :bufo-grapes: when snacks arrive, :bronze-bufo: for premium wins, :bufo-just-ice: after epic burns, :bufo-offers-pancakes: for generosity, and :confused-math-bufo: when the numbers don't work. React with :bufo-loading: during deploys, :bufo-gets-whiplash: for rapid pivots, :bufo-crewmate-purple: when feeling sus, :bufo-double-chin: to self-roast, :bufo-bag-of-bufos: when hoarding, :bufo-remembers-bad-time: for regrets, and :bufo-tortoise: for slow wins. You now have everything you need to master Slack.
batch_announcements.8:
The Bufo National Museum unveils its latest exhibition around the stunning

 centerpiece. Surrounding it are intimate studies: :bufo-blank-stare: (contemplation, 2026), :bufo-caught-a-small-bufo: (predation series), and :bufo-crying-why: (emotional depth). Two interactive installations featuring :bufo-offers-a-jetpack-zebra: and :bufo-offers-a-like: invite visitors to ponder amphibian altruism and technological whimsy
batch_announcements.9: NEW BUFO USER GUIDE: Use :awesomebufo: when shipping without bugs, :bufo-angrily-gives-you-white-elephant-gift: for passive aggression, :bufo-bouquet: for apologies, and :bufo-breakdown: when Prod dies at 3am. Deploy :bufo-crewmate-pink-bounce: and :bufo-crewmate-purple-bounce: when sus energy fills the room, :bufo-didnt-listen-to-willy-wonka: when warnings get ignored, :bufo-hipster: before it's cool, and :bufo-increases-his-dimensionality-while-trapped-in-the-void: during architecture debates where you're :bufo-is-lonely: waiting for approval. React with :bufo-kiwi: for fruit vibes, :bufo-kudo: for props, :bufo-nah: to bad takes, :bufo-notice-me-senpai: when attention-seeking, :bufo-offers-a-webhook-but-the-logo-is-canonically-correct: for nerd flexing, :bufo-offers-falafel: when sharing food, :bufo-offers-google-doc: to collaborate, :bufo-offers-model-1857-12-pounder-napoleon-cannon: to end arguments, :bufo-offers-you-an-urgent-ticket: on Mondays, :bufo-onion: to endless layers, :bufo-ping: for attention, :bufo-quadruple-vaccinated: to show prep, :bufo-salivating: over snacks, :bufo-slowly-heads-out: when done, and :bufo-sussy-eyebrows: when something's off. Finish with :bufo-will-not-be-going-to-space-today: for cancellations, :bufo-zoom: to escape, :bufos-in-love: for team moments, :feelsgoodbufo: when you nail it, :good-news-bufo-offers-suppository: for unsolicited advice, :loch-ness-bufo: for mysteries, :low-fidelity-bufo-concerned: when worried, :triumphant-bufo: for wins, and :vintage-bufo: for nostalgia.
batch_announcements.10:
Now on display at the Bufo National Museum, Batch #10. The centerpiece is :bufo-is-better-known-for-the-things-he-does-on-the-mattress:, a monumental work flanked by :bufo-isnt-going-to-rewind-the-vhs-before-returning-it: and the recursive masterpiece :bufo-offering-bufo-offering-bufo-offering-bufo:. The Offerings Wing showcases :bufo-offers-a-ball-of-mud:, :bufo-offers-an-ethernet-cable:, :bufo-offers-git-mailing-list:, :bufo-offers-google-drive:, :bufo-offers-chatgpt:, :bufo-offers-tayto:, and :bufo-offers-caribufo:, while the café serves :bufo-tofu: and :bufo-olives: alongside a :bufo-has-a-sandwich: — :bufo-regret: is complimentary, and :bufo-detective: has been stationed at the exit by a very suspicious :bufo-old: curator.

batch_announcements.11:
[whispers] Here, in the quiet marshlands of the digital workspace, we observe :bufo-morning: stirring from his nest — his :bufo-eyes: wide with wonder — while :bufo-in-his-cozy-bed-hoping-he-never-gets-capitated: categorically refuses to do the same. :bufo-lurk: and :bufo-watches-from-a-distance: hold motionless in the reeds as :bufo-long: surveys the horizon and :bufo-mitosis: divides before our very eyes, spawning :many-bufos: while :maybe-a-bufo-bigfoot: leaves only tracks and rumor in his wake. The :poison-dart-bufo:, resplendent in his :bufo-sombrero:, exchanges a :bufo-cuddle: with :so-bufoful:, who deeply :bufo-loves-blobs:, as :bufo-skeledance: performs the ancient rites, :bufo-fears-the-full-moon: gazes skyward with existential dread, and :bufo-thinks-about-climbing: the tallest reed in the marsh. And finally — against all odds — :teamwork-makes-the-bufo-work:, the most extraordinary phenomenon this naturalist has ever been privileged to witness.

batch_announcements.13: NEW BUFO USER GUIDE: Start every morning with :bufo-good-morning: and :bufo-morning-starbucks:, escalate to :bufo-popping-out-of-the-coffee: once it hits and :bufo-popping-out-of-the-coffee-upsidedown: if you misjudged the dose, then :bufo-airpods: in to signal you've entered :bufo-achieving-coding-flow: — deploy :bufo-is-it-done: every 90 seconds at CI, :bufo-angry-bullfrog-screech: when it fails, :bufo-stopsign: before you post your feelings about it, :bufo-hides: after you posted them anyway, :bufo-pensivity-turned-discomfort-upon-realization-of-reality: at every all-hands, :bufo-furiously-trying-to-cycle-but-legs-too-short: whenever someone says "we just need to move faster," :bufo-encourages-you-to-wrap-it-up: at minute 45 of any meeting, and :bufo-bouncer-says-its-time-to-go-now: at minute 60 with full moral authority. In the wild: lead with :bufo-pretends-to-have-authority: before any arch decision, :bufo-gandalf: the moment scope creeps in, :bufo-gives-you-a-feature-flag: when shipping something cursed, :bufo-here-to-make-a-dill-for-more-pickles: when someone proposes a terrible compromise, :bufo-laughing-popcorn: for any Slack drama you're spectating, :bufo-betray: for drama you're personally causing, :bufo-sus: during suspiciously quiet deploy windows, :bufo-is-keeping-his-eye-on-you: during code freeze, :bufo-prays-to-azure: before cloud migrations, :bufo-old-bufo-yells-at-cloud: immediately after, :bufo-cant-believe-your-audacity: when someone suggests a rewrite, and :bufo-wat: as a universal fallback. For gifting: :bufo-offers-coffee: when someone's struggling, :bufo-offers-boba: when they're really struggling, :bufo-offers-a-banana-in-these-trying-times: mid-incident, :bufo-offers-jira: passive-aggressively, :bufo-offers-an-issue: when someone complains verbally instead of filing a ticket, :bufo-offers-a-pr: when they complain the fix is taking too long, :bufo-offers-you-a-db-for-your-customer-data: in response to any spreadsheet proposal, :bufo-offers-you-dangerously-high-rate-limits: for maximum chaos, :bufo-offers-you-the-best-emoji-culture-ever: every single day because it is simply true, and :bufo-offers-bufo: when you have nothing else but you mean it from the soul. Reserve the cinematic heavy-hitters for worthy moments: :bufo-is-doing-doordash-deliveries-in-the-evenings-because-he-lost-the-family-savings-on-memecoins: for any crypto conversation, :bufo-wants-to-return-his-vacuum-that-he-bought-at-costco-four-years-ago-for-a-full-refund: for anyone who is completely and utterly done, :bufo-underpaid-postage-at-usps-and-now-they-re-coming-after-him-for-the-money-he-owes: for tech debt retros, :constipated-bufo-is-trying-his-hardest: for any standup featuring the phrase "making progress," :bufoheimer: the moment you grasp the full implications of what you've shipped, :buforce-be-with-you: right before a big release, and :bufo-unlocked-transdimensional-travel-while-in-the-void: when the legacy codebase has fully and permanently shattered your understanding of time, space, and professional identity.
batch_announcements.14: NEW BUFO USER GUIDE: Open every morning with :bufo-sips-coffee:, upgrade to :bufo-drinking-coffee: by the second alarm, pivot to :bufo-everything-is-on-fire: and :bufo-is-panicking: at standup, deploy :bufo-caused-an-incident: if that fire was you, and quietly retire to :bufo-existential-dread-sets-in: for the rest of the morning block. Use :bufo-gives-vin-diesel-a-gentle-little-kiss-on-his-shiny-head: to celebrate literally any win, :bufo-keeps-his-password-written-on-a-post-it-note-stuck-to-his-monitor: during the next security training, :bufo-indulges-in-a-hot-dog-omakase: when you're turning a sad desk lunch into a full experience, :bufo-mama-mia-thatsa-one-spicy-a-meatball: for any PR comment with a little too much sauce, :bufo-hop-in-we-re-going-to-flavortown: when someone pitches an idea that is completely unhinged but you're going, :bufo-declines-your-suppository-offer: for anything being offered to you that you will simply not accept, :bufo-loves-bake-sale-brownies-so-much-that-it-got-him-to-vote-at-the-elementary-school: for any motivation that is absurd but completely valid, and :bufo-but-his-arms-are-ho-scale-model-trains: for anything that is mostly normal except for one devastating detail. Reserve :bufo-is-vindicated-that-they-should-have-added-pitching-at-the-deadline-but-it-is-not-helping: for the specific agony of being catastrophically correct while the thing remains broken, :bufo-yankees-fan-is-waiting-for-the-right-time-to-ask-how-youre-doing: for when you are technically in a Zoom but emotionally at the stadium, :bufo-cant-stop-thinking-about-usher-killing-it-on-roller-skates: for any meeting where your brain has quietly filed for remote work, and :bufo-became-a-stranger-whose-laugh-you-can-recognize-anywhere: for the exact moment a coworker becomes a real person to you.
batch_announcements.15: FIELD GUIDE — Bufoidae Communis, Batch #15 (Spring Census): Today's survey has confirmed 610 new specimens flooding the ecosystem, spearheaded by the physically impossible :according-to-all-known-laws-of-aviation-there-is-no-way-a-bufo-should-be-able-to-fly:, the chronically aggrieved :angry-karen-bufo-would-like-to-speak-with-your-manager:, and a remarkable cluster of deeply relatable subspecies: :bufo-broke-his-toe-and-isn-t-sure-what-to-do-about-the-12k-he-signed-up-for:, :bufo-forgot-to-charge-his-airpods-before-the-flight-and-now-has-to-be-alone-with-his-thoughts:, :bufo-has-gotta-poop-but-hes-stuck-in-a-long-meeting:, :bufo-just-walked-into-an-awkward-conversation-and-is-now-trying-to-figure-out-how-to-leave:, :bufo-was-eavesdropping-and-got-offended-by-your-convo-but-now-has-to-pretend-he-didnt-hear-you:, :bufo-is-sad-no-one-complimented-their-agent-47-cosplay:, and :bufo-wonders-if-deliciousness-of-this-cheese-is-worth-the-pain-his-lactose-intolerance-will-cause:. Also catalogued: :bufo-is-ready-to-burn-down-the-mta-because-their-train-skipped-their-station-again:, :bufo-is-struggling-to-stay-awake-after-ordering-the-beef-wellington-at-lunch:, :bufo-wants-to-know-your-spaghetti-policy-at-the-movies:, :tsa-bufo-gropes-you:, :corporate-bufo-demands-more-ai-slop:, :spotify-wrapped-reminded-bufo-his-listening-patterns-are-a-little-unhinged:, :bufo-considers-tasting-the-tide-pod-just-this-one-time:, and :bufo-brain-damage-escalates-to-new-heights:, all joining their kin :bufo-ambiently-existing:, :bufo-drifts-through-the-void:, :bufo-screams-into-the-ambient-void:, :bufo-this-is-fine:, :bufo-hype:, :bufo-panic:, :bufo-vibe:, :bufo-ponders:, :bufo-think:, :bufo-shipit:, :bufo-lgtm:, :bufo-yay:, :bufo-party:, :bufo-wave:, :bufo-heart:, :bufo-sad-but-ok:, and the full assemblage now thriving in this Slack watershed. Observers are advised to leave offerings of :bufo-boba: or :bufo-has-a-fresh-slice: to gain trust, and to remember that :bufo-ambiently-existing: has always been here and will outlast us all.
